name: uniQure N.V.
business: uniQure N.V. is a gene therapy company focused on developing single-treatment cures for rare and devastating diseases. It has one approved product, HEMGENIX for hemophilia B, which is out-licensed to CSL Behring, and a pipeline of investigational gene therapies for Huntington's disease, refractory mesial temporal lobe epilepsy, Fabry disease, and SOD1-ALS.
sellsTo: patients with refractory mesial temporal lobe epilepsy

exposures.sentence: We are a leader in the field of gene therapy, seeking to deliver to patients suffering from rare and other devastating diseases single treatments with potentially curative results.

catalysts.event: Plan to request a Type B meeting with FDA in Q2 2026 to discuss Phase III study design for AMT-130
catalysts.sentence: We intend to continue engaging with the FDA regarding Phase III development considerations and plan to request a Type B meeting in the second quarter of 2026 to further discuss potential study design approaches.

catalysts.event: Potential draw of $100 million tranche from Hercules loan if BLA for AMT-130 approved prior to June 15, 2027
catalysts.sentence: an additional term loan tranche of $100.0 million, which can be drawn at our option, subject to the BLA approval of AMT-130 prior to June 2027, provided that confirmatory trials to the extent and in the manner required to support full approval (if applicable) remain ongoing or are being planned

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 75,000 people have Huntington's disease in the U.S., European Union, and United Kingdom, with approximately 40,000 symptomatic patients in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 75,000 people have Huntington s disease in the U.S., European Union ( EU ), and United Kingdom ( UK ), with approximately 40,000 symptomatic Huntington s disease patients in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Temporal Lobe Epilepsy affects approximately 0.5 million people in the U.S. alone, of which approximately 0.3 million are refractory.
tamClaims.sentence: Temporal Lobe Epilepsy ( TLE ) affects approximately 0.5 million people in the U.S. alone, of which approximately 0.3 million U.S. patients are inadequately treated through anti-seizure medications and are considered refractory.

tamClaims.claim: In the U.S., there may be approximately 7,000 type 1 Fabry patients.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S., there may be approximately 7,000 type 1 Fabry patients.

tamClaims.claim: ALS affects up to approximately 35,000 adults in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: ALS affects up to approximately 35,000 adults in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: It is estimated that there are approximately 300 to 600 patients with SOD1-ALS in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that there are approximately 300 to 600 patients with SOD1-ALS in the U.S.
